title: About
text: This page is a normal Quarto document linked from the navigation bar.

title: About
text:
Structure



File
Role




_quarto.yml
Site title, navbar, theme, and shared HTML options


index.qmd
Home page


about.qmd
This page


styles.scss
Extra colors and layout tweaks

title: About
text:
Next steps

Add figures, citations, or code chunks to any .qmd file.
Change theme under format.html in _quarto.yml (e.g. minty, flatly, sandstone).
Turn on search by adding search: true under website in _quarto.yml if your Quarto version supports it.

title: Hello
text: This is a small demo site with navigation, a consistent theme, and room to grow. Edit index.qmd and _quarto.yml to match your course or project.

title: Hello
text:
What you get



Projects
Render the whole folder with one command. Shared YAML keeps titles, theme, and output in sync.




Authoring
Write in Markdown (.qmd) or Jupyter (.ipynb). Quarto turns them into HTML, PDF, and more.




Polished HTML
Bootstrap-based layout, table of contents, and optional search — suitable for assignments and portfolios.

title: Hello
text:
Quick start

From the quarto-hello folder, render or preview:
quarto render
quarto preview
Then open the URL shown in the terminal (often http://localhost:xxxx).







TipTip



Use About in the navbar for a second page. Add more .qmd files and list them under website.navbar.left in _quarto.yml.
